content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Poisoned Dagger". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1613/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: The output should be a single integer, which is the maximum number of elements that can be removed.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the array and then remove the minimum number of elements to make all elements equal.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
arr.sort()
max = 0
for i in range(n - 1):
    if arr[i] == arr[i + 1]:
        max += 1
print(n - max - 1)
